title: molten norwegian paccheri pasta
description: a winey, comforting meal-prep dish featuring paccheri pasta, kombu-cold-extract, and a hint of dash. perfect for a cold norwegian winter evening.

ingredients.name: kombu
ingredients.notes: cold-extract the kombu first, then discard the solids.

ingredients.name: dash
ingredients.notes: use a light hand with the dash, as it can overpower the dish.

instructions: cook the paccheri pasta according to the package instructions until al dente. reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
saute the onion and garlic in olive oil until translucent.
add the dry white wine and reduce by half.
add the kombu-cold-extract and stir to combine.
add the parmesan cheese and stir until melted.
stir in the dash, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
add the cooked pasta to the sauce and toss until well coated.
if the sauce seems too thick, add a bit of the reserved pasta water.
transfer the pasta to a serving dish and top with chopped parsley.
serve immediately, as the molten sauce is best when the cheese is still melted.
